name: 529 to Roth IRA Rollover

eligibility.description: The 529 account must have been maintained for at least 15 years; annual rollover limits apply based on IRA contribution limits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows tax-free rollovers of up to $35,000 (lifetime limit) from a long-term 529 account to a Roth IRA for the beneficiary.
